steps.title: Substitute the repeated expression
steps.content:
Notice that $(4 - 7x)$ appears twice. Let $u = 4 - 7x$. Substituting into the original equation:
$$9 - 8u = 5 - 9u$$

steps.title: Solve for u
steps.content:
Rearrange to isolate $u$:
$$9 - 8u = 5 - 9u$$
$$9 - 5 = -9u + 8u$$
$$4 = -u$$
$$u = -4$$
Since $u = 4 - 7x$, the value of $4 - 7x$ is $-4$.
